zh.lifeSummary: 當Anséric II de Montréal , Sgr de Chacenay於1087年出生在法國阿奎泰道多哈帕格-吉方泰時，他的父親Milon de Chacenay25歲，母親Adélaide de la Fere31歲。他於大約1110年與Humbeline de Troys de Fontaines-Les-Dijon結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1137年在他的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anséric II de Montréal , Sgr de Chacenay于1087年出生在法国阿奎泰道多哈帕格-吉方泰时，他的父亲Milon de Chacenay25岁，母亲Adélaide de la Fere31岁。他于大约1110年与Humbeline de Troys de Fontaines-Les-Dijon结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1137年在他的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montréal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hispanic (Mexico): altered form of Spanish   Monreal  .

variants.name: Monreal
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Francisco, Jesus, Ricardo, Jaime, Luis, Pedro, Amador, Guadalupe.
Spanish: habitational name from any of the places called Monreal, for example in Cuenca, Teruel, and Zaragoza provinces.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Anséric II de Montréal , Sgr de Chacenay was born in 1087, in Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France, his father, Milon de Chacenay, was 25 and his mother, Adélaide de la Fere, was 31. He married Humbeline de Troys de Fontaines-Les-Dijon about 1110. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1137, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anséric II de Montréal , Sgr de Chacenay est né en 1087, à Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France, son père, Milon de Chacenay, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Adélaide de la Fere, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Humbeline de Troys de Fontaines-Les-Dijon environ 1110. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1137, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anséric II de Montréal , Sgr de Chacenay 1087 in Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Milon de Chacenay 25 und seine Mutter Adélaide de la Fere 31. Er hat um 1110 Humbeline de Troys de Fontaines-Les-Dijon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1137 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anséric II de Montréal , Sgr de Chacenay è nato il nel 1087 nel Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Milon de Chacenay, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Adélaide de la Fere, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Humbeline de Troys de Fontaines-Les-Dijon circa 1110. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1137, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anséric II de Montréal , Sgr de Chacenayが1087年にフランスアクイティアインドールドグンチャンプアグネ-エト-フォンティアインで生まれた時，父Milon de Chacenayは25歳，母Adélaide de la Fereは31歳であった。約1110年にHumbeline de Troys de Fontaines-Les-Dijonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1137年に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anséric II de Montréal , Sgr de Chacenay(이)가 1087년 프랑스 아키테인 도르도그니 챔파그니-트-폰테인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Milon de Chacenay(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Adélaide de la Fere(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1110년 Humbeline de Troys de Fontaines-Les-Dijon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1137년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anséric II de Montréal , Sgr de Chacenay nasceu em 1087, em Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Milon de Chacenay, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Adélaide de la Fere, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Humbeline de Troys de Fontaines-Les-Dijon aproximadamente 1110. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1137, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anséric II de Montréal , Sgr de Chacenay родился в 1087 г. в местности чампагне-ет-фонтеин, дордогн, аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Milon de Chacenay было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Adélaide de la Fere, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Humbeline de Troys de Fontaines-Les-Dijon около 1110 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1137 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anséric II de Montréal , Sgr de Chacenay nació en 1087, en Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Milon de Chacenay, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Adélaide de la Fere, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Humbeline de Troys de Fontaines-Les-Dijon aproximadamente 1110. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1137, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
